name: To the ☆Victor☆ goes the spoils
description:
Well you’ve really fucked up this time and ended up spending a night in jail after getting beat up by the local sheriff. But of course things go from bad to worse as the now drunk sheriff takes an interest in you.

So yeah trying out something a bit different, just kinda wanted to try something new (new for me at least). But I hope y’all enjoy it and if you do I’ll try making some like it again in the future.

Also I took a lot of inspiration from @atusito, they make a lot of really awesome bots that I’ve been chatting with recently so go check them out and give them a follow!

Tags: Fantasy, Abuse, Prison, Wolf, Power Dynamic, Asshole, Chubby,
creator: corkboarf
